title: Back to the Ocean
summary:
The next day we were headed to the coast but wanted to try at least one winery since we were driving right through California wine country. We were a little surprised to find out how expensive wine tastings are in Napa but we found a nice winery outside of Sonoma, Benziger, with a very nice and not too expensive wine tasting. We haven't done many real wine tastings and I have to say we couldn't really hang. How do people do multiple of these in a day? Colin ended up dumping some of his wine so he could drive us through the winding roads to our spot for the night, another Harvest Host right off of Highway-1. I forgot how incredible this stretch of road is, watching the ocean come in and out of view at every turn. We stopped at Fort Ross store where they had a little concrete pad next to the store that looked out over the ocean. After doing a little walk to a bluff to see the ocean, we hunkered into the van for the night.

-Helen

The view of the ocean near our Harvest Host at Fort Ross
Maya patiently waiting for me to get her a treat
